caption:
WRAP UP 2025 on 2026?

It’s been a year since I started managing this account. When I was assigned as the social media manager of MMUESC, I felt both excited and scared. There were so many unknowns waiting for me to explore — and honestly, I worried that I might get overwhelmed.

But looking back now, I’m proud to have been chosen to manage this page. Being able to read your replies to our Instastories, your reactions, your comments, or even just seeing a simple notification that someone liked our post — all of it makes me feel grateful.

Over the past year, I’ve felt like an observer who got the privilege to witness how our club grew so much throughout 2026. We started the year with UniCup S1 — my first big project — then continued with our MLBB roster, HOK roster, Ebee Cupz, and the most unexpected one: creating our own jersey.

It’s a weird metaphor, but over the past year MMUESC has felt like raising a child — and me, as a newbie parent, guiding it, supporting it, and feeding it with passion and enthusiasm. Watching it grow from a child to a teenager and now finally into an adult.

Now in 2026, we’re still not satisfied. We remember our goal, our vow, and our mission: to gather gamers into a gaming community.

To every gamer out there — if you ever feel tired, alone, or underestimated, we are here. This family is waiting for you.

—HOD in Public Relation, Ethan

We are looking for more committee, join us with the link in bio

caption:
🎯 MMUESC OPEN VALORANT SCRIMS 🎯

An Open Valorant Scrims Session for all members are welcomed to join if your here who loves to play, compete, or just want to have a great time together!! Whether you’re here to learn, improve, get to know new people, or just enjoy a chill custom match with other members everyone is welcome 🤝

This is the perfect chance to meet new members, to get to know one another, and experience some friendly competition in a fun and supportive environment 💬

📆 Date: 20th December 2025
📍 Held: Online (Discord)
📲 Scan the QR code

SAMSUNG ODYSEEY CUP CS2📱🏆

We’re honored to be invited to the Samsung Odyssey Cup CS2 🖥💥
4 of our MMUESC committee members had the opportunity to work behind the scenes, learning the real operations of a professional esports tournament

From pre-event preparation and technical setup, to match-day operations and live coordination, our team saw firsthand how every detail matters in delivering a smooth and exciting competition. The fast-paced environment, teamwork, and problem-solving involved gave us invaluable exposure to the esports industry beyond just gameplay🎮💥

#samsungodysseycup #samsung #embraceyourgame

🏆KCS TOUR CHAMPION🏆

MMU Esports Club HOK roster conquers KCS and walks away as CHAMPIONS🔥🔥🔥

Huge respect to the squad for repping MMU with pride.🫡🫡🫡

#hok #honorofking #honorofkingmalaysia

CONVOFEST MLBB TOURNAMENT 🎮🔥
The tournament brought intense matchups, sharp strategies, and electrifying team fights that kept the hype alive throughout the event. Every squad stepped into the arena with confidence and left their mark, making this MLBB tournament a true highlight of CONVOFEST. 🏆
Huge congratulations to our winners and sincere thanks to all participants, supporters, and the MMUESC team who made this event a success. Until next time — the Land of Dawn awaits! 💪

#mlbb #mobilelegend #mlbbmalaysia

#HonorOfKings #HOKCampusSeries #Season2

Recently 25 November 2025 , MMUESC have attend "2025 China–Malaysia E-Sports & Cultural Tourism Industry Salon and Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) Signing Ceremony" at China Cultural Centre, Kuala Lumpur.

In this mou signing with Varsity Esports Alliance (Hereinafter referred to as “VEA” is wholly owned by Team Rey Esports Sdn. Bhd) and NetDragon Websoft Inc to establish a University Esports Cooperation Network providing corporate resource support to MMU Esport Club . To comprehensively enhance the competitive level, educational quality, and exchange standards of university Esports clubs by leveraging the VEA's tournaments and platforms alongside  professional resources. To promote the availability of Esports educational resources and AI courses. To help university Esports clubs improve their organisational and operational capabilities, fostering the long-term development of campus Esports. 

We are glad to be partnership in this program cant wait to see what we could do in future !
